dict.string: Dynamo shows your upcoming events in the notch tray.
Dynamo shows your upcoming events in the notch tray.
Dynamo uses your location to show local weather in the notch. Location is sent only to Apple’s WeatherKit service to fetch the forecast; you can also set a location manually in Settings instead.
Dynamo can show a live camera mirror in the notch. The camera only runs while you have the Webcam tab open — never in the background.
